## Chore Summary

- What maintenance work was completed?

## Scope

- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] CI/CD changes
- [ ] Documentation updates

## Validation

- [ ] Extension build passes (`cd extension && npm ci && npm run build`)
- [ ] Runtime tests pass (`cd runtime && go test ./...`)
- [ ] Any additional checks were run

## Notes

- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to?
